span.p: Does it act on a specific object identified by a client-supplied ID?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Object-level BOLA: verify THIS caller owns/may access THIS object - every request, server-side

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Function-level BFLA: verify the caller's role/scope permits THIS function

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Is it ALSO a privileged/admin function?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Both checks: object ownership AND function role - they are independent
